hooks.command: jq -c '{instanceId: .session_id, cwd: .cwd}' | curl -s -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d @- "http://localhost:${MCP_VOICE_HOOKS_PORT:-5111}/api/hooks/session-start" || echo '{}'
jq -c '{instanceId: .session_id, cwd: .cwd}' | curl -s -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d @- "http://localhost:${MCP_VOICE_HOOKS_PORT:-5111}/api/hooks/stop" || echo '{}'
jq -c '{instanceId: .session_id, cwd: .cwd}' | curl -s -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d @- "http://localhost:${MCP_VOICE_HOOKS_PORT:-5111}/api/hooks/pre-speak" || echo '{}'
jq -c '{instanceId: .session_id, cwd: .cwd}' | curl -s -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d @- "http://localhost:${MCP_VOICE_HOOKS_PORT:-5111}/api/hooks/post-tool" || echo '{}'
